     The Numbers Business Report

See How They Run (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,586,237Details
International Box Office $12,380,397
Worldwide Box Office $21,966,634
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the West End of 1950s London, plans for a movie version of a smash-hit play come to an abrupt halt after a pivotal member of the crew is murdered. When world-weary Inspector Stoppard and eager rookie Constable Stalker take on the case, the two find themselves thrown into a puzzling whodunit within the glamorously sordid theater underground, investigating the mysterious homicide at their own peril.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,007,657 (31.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.19 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,404 opening theaters/2,502 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $10,888,073

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 16th, 2022 (Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: September 7th, 2022 (Wide), released as Coup de théâtre (France)
September 9th, 2022 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
September 14th, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
September 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
September 15th, 2022 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: November 1st, 2022 by Searchlight Pictures
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violence/bloody images and a sexual reference.
(Rating bulletin 2726 (cert #53669), 4/6/2022)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Geographical setting: England, London
Plot point: Murder Mystery
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Time period setting: 1950s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Searchlight Pictures , DJ Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
